title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
summary_full: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
summary_public: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
